commit.message:
fix: add chunk_size to iterator() calls with prefetch_related

prefetch_related is ignored when iterator() is called without
chunk_size, causing N+1 queries on journal.lines.all(). Adding
chunk_size=100 enables prefetching in batches.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: robust journal TB reversal + fix_journal_tb_orphans command

Root cause: journal_delete's TB reversal had two failure modes:
1. FK-based path found nothing for journals posted before source_journal
   FK was added (migration 0068)
2. Legacy fallback's exact (account_code, debit, credit) match failed
   when journals were edited after posting (values diverged)
3. on_delete=SET_NULL silently orphaned remaining TB lines when
   journal.delete() fired, permanently breaking traceability

Fix — multi-tier _reverse_journal_tb_lines() shared helper:
- Tier 1: FK-based deletion (source_journal FK, authoritative)
- Tier 2: Exact value match (account_code + debit + credit, pre-FK)
- Tier 3: Broad match (account_code + source type only, catches
  diverged values from failed edits)
- Belt-and-suspenders: explicitly null source_journal before
  journal.delete() so SET_NULL cascade can't orphan lines

Also fixed:
- depreciation_post_to_tb: now passes journal= to link TB lines
- review_post_opening_balance: now passes journal= to link TB lines
- journal_edit: uses same shared _reverse_journal_tb_lines() helper

New management command fix_journal_tb_orphans:
- Phase 1: Backfills source_journal FK on unlinked TB adjustment lines
- Phase 2: Finds truly orphaned TB lines (no matching journal)
- Phase 3: Reports journals with mismatched TB impact (count/totals)
- Supports --dry-run, --delete-orphans, --entity, --journal flags

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat(bingo): virtual rounds + sequential tx queue

## Sequential TX queue (bingoService.js)
All operator wallet writes (createRound, closeRound, cancelRound) now run
through a single promise chain. Each operation waits for the previous one
to complete before submitting, guaranteeing no concurrent nonce use and
eliminating "replacement underpriced" / "already known" errors permanently.

## Virtual round design (bingoSchedulerOnChain.js + DB migration)
Rooms now create DB-only "virtual" rounds (round_id ≥ 1,000,000,001) at
the start of each cycle. On-chain transactions happen only when needed:

  - 0 cards bought  → cancel in DB (ZERO gas, ZERO LINK)
  - Cards bought     → promoteVirtualRound() = createRound+close on-chain

This eliminates:
  - MaxOpenRoundsReached (contract slots never consumed by empty rounds)
  - Stuck close txs for empty rounds (most rounds are empty)
  - LINK consumption on fruitless VRF requests
  - The 10-minute TTL dead zone (blocked slots are virtual, not on-chain)

## DB migration (add-bingo-virtual-rounds.js)
  - Creates bingo_virtual_round_id_seq (start 1,000,000,001)
  - Makes bingo_rounds.round_id nullable (NULL until on-chain promotion)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix escalation relay timing, grace check semantics, and 00:00 time display

- scheduleEscalationRelayTask: Math.floor → Math.ceil to prevent sub-second
  early delivery causing grace check failure (e.g. T+119.5s < T+120s = false)
- processStaffEscalation: use NEXT contact's graceMinutes for grace check
  (not current attempt's), + 5s tolerance for Cloud Tasks early delivery
- processWorkStepEscalation: same grace check fixes
- EscalationAlert.tsx: treat "00:00" startTime as empty, fall through to
  getEarliestDetectionRuleTime() for correct time display
- work-templates/new/page.tsx: use detection rule checkTime instead of "00:00"
  when no start-type rule exists

Initial implementation of Apple TV Twitch custom HA integration

- Standalone custom component (custom_components/apple_tv_twitch/) that
  piggybacks on the built-in apple_tv config entry (no re-pairing)
- Config flow: single-step picker lists existing Apple TV entries
- AppleTVTwitchManager: owns pyatv connection with 30s reconnect loop,
  push delegate forwarding updates to media player entity
- media_player entity: polls metadata.app every 10s for Twitch detection,
  exposes state PLAYING when Twitch active / IDLE otherwise
- apple_tv_twitch.play_channel service: launches twitch://stream/<channel>
  via Companion protocol deep link
- diagnostic.py: standalone script to run with Twitch open to discover
  bundle ID and content_identifier format
- hacs.json, manifest.json, services.yaml, strings.json, brand icon

commit.message:
[Explorer] E000 Phase 1: Add transaction list controls with auto-refresh toggle (#255)

## Summary
This PR adds a new `TransactionListControls` component that provides
users with manual refresh and auto-refresh toggle functionality for the
transaction proposals list. The component displays the last update
timestamp and allows users to control whether the list automatically
refreshes.

## Key Changes
- **New Component**: Created `TransactionListControls` component with:
  - Manual "Refresh now" button that triggers data refetch
  - Auto-refresh toggle button (ON/OFF)
- Last updated timestamp display with `formatLastUpdated` utility
function
  - Loading spinner during fetch operations
  - Proper disabled state handling while fetching

- **Hook Enhancement**: Modified `useRecentTransactionProposals` to
accept an `autoRefresh` parameter that controls whether automatic
refetching is enabled

- **State Management**: Added `autoRefresh` state in the main `AppInner`
component to manage the toggle state and pass it through to the hook

- **Integration**: Updated `RecentTransactionProposals` component to
accept and render the new controls with all necessary props

## Implementation Details
- The `formatLastUpdated` function formats timestamps using
`Intl.DateTimeFormat` with hour, minute, second, and timezone
information, displaying "—" when no update has occurred
- The refresh button is disabled during fetch operations to prevent
duplicate requests
- A spinning SVG icon appears while data is being fetched
- The auto-refresh toggle uses the `aria-pressed` attribute for proper
accessibility
- Comprehensive test coverage included for both the utility function and
component behavior

https://claude.ai/code/session_01P7eouj2aUvvLgaEzTzjStq

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: add async: true to SessionEnd hook to prevent upload cancellation

Race condition confirmed: 6/150 sessions (4%) silently fail when Claude Code
kills the hook subprocess before completion. Async detaches from parent
signal group so the upload survives session teardown.

Refs DaveX2001/deliverable-tracking#1096

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: Enable TLS unit tests in CI by setting ARROW_TEST_DATA and regenerating keystores

The TLS tests (ConnectionTlsTest, ConnectionTlsRootCertsTest,
ConnectionMutualTlsTest) were failing because ARROW_TEST_DATA was not
set and the JKS keystores were stale. CI now generates keystores from
the arrow-testing submodule certs and sets ARROW_TEST_DATA.

Also treats UNAUTHENTICATED as benign during CloseSession, since
unauthenticated connections cannot close server-side sessions.

fix: 설비 가동률 계산 시 주말 제외하여 정확한 가동률 표시

가동률 = 실제생산량 / (일최대생산량 × 기간일수) 에서
기간일수를 달력일수(주말포함)가 아닌 평일(월~금)만 카운트하도록 수정.
예: 30일 기간 → 23 평일로 계산, 가동률 약 30% 상승.

commit.message:
Run 35: Stability-focused — selective full EngineAI weights + tighter termination

Goal: eliminate falling. Selectively boost 6 stability-critical rewards to
full EngineAI while keeping 13 others at proven /1.5 scaling.

Changes:
- termination_height: 0.45 → 0.65m (tighter margin, 0.163m vs 0.36m)
- push_interval_s: 15.0 → 8.0s (more frequent reactive stepping practice)
- rew_orientation: 0.67 → 1.0 (stronger upright incentive)
- rew_ref_joint_pos: 1.47 → 2.2 (tighter gait tracking)
- rew_base_height: 0.13 → 0.2 (maintain standing height)
- rew_vel_mismatch: 0.33 → 0.5 (penalize unwanted z-motion)
- rew_track_vel_hard: 0.33 → 0.5 (force velocity tracking)
- rew_low_speed: 0.13 → 0.2 (punish slowness)

commit.message:
fix: stateless pending QA — survives Vercel cold starts

pendingQA was an in-memory Map that got lost between serverless
invocations. Now encodes QA data (skill + docId) into the Slack
message itself as a PENDING_QA tag. Thread reply handler reads
thread history via Slack API to recover pending state on cold starts.

fix: промпт — скрыть chain-of-thought + фикс S=/P= итогов

- AI думает про себя, выводит только сводку (экономия ~1000 токенов)
- Предупреждение: S= и P= внизу страницы = итог, не отдельная комната
- Проверка: S= должен совпадать с length×width, иначе считай сам
- Периметр >30м = скорее всего итог нескольких комнат
